history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with dark hair, wearing a blue baseball cap backwards, a white oversized t-shirt with black graphic text that appears to say "Deyyou", and baggy black pants, stands on a wooden walkway at night. The person is looking down with their hands on their hips. The walkway is wet and reflects the ambient light from surrounding decorative lamps. Small white flowers with green leaves line the edges of the walkway. In the background, other people are visible in soft focus, walking in an area with dark, wet paving and large potted plants. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, with warm light from the lamps creating highlights on the wet surfaces. The overall mood is moody, urban, and slightly mysterious, with a focus on the individual's casual, streetwear-inspired fashion. The color palette is dominated by dark blues, blacks, whites, and the warm glow of the lights. The image has a shallow depth of field, blurring the background and emphasizing the subject.
